title: HMAC (Hash-based Message Authentication Code) Generation Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of creating an HMAC to verify the integrity and authenticity of a message.
relationships: Secret Key is XORed with ipad to create inner padded key
Inner padded key is concatenated with the message
Result is hashed to produce first hash value
Secret Key is XORed with opad to create outer padded key
Outer padded key is concatenated with the first hash value
Result is hashed again to produce the final HMAC
